message.content:
Explore the codebase at /Users/anotonio.silva/antonio/lol to understand:

1. The current ActionPanel component implementation (src/components/action_panel/) - read all files
2. How App.tsx wires keyboard shortcuts and state management
3. The types.ts file for action-related types
4. The existing token/design system in src/styles/_tokens.scss (specifically $shadow-popover, $color-surface, $radius-lg)
5. How the command palette component is structured

Give me full file contents for all relevant files. Be thorough - I need to understand the complete picture.

content.text: I'll explore the codebase thoroughly to understand the ActionPanel implementation, keyboard shortcuts, state management, and design system.

1→interface IconProps {
     2→  size?: number;
     3→}
     4→
     5→const defaults: Required<IconProps> = { size: 20 };
     6→
     7→function svgProps(props: IconProps) {
     8→  const s = props.size ?? defaults.size;
     9→  return {
    10→    width: s,
    11→    height: s,
    12→    viewBox: '0 0 20 20',
    13→    fill: 'none',
    14→    xmlns: 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg',
    15→  } as const;
    16→}
    17→
    18→const STROKE = {
    19→  stroke: 'currentColor',
    20→  strokeWidth: 1.5,
    21→  strokeLinecap: 'round' as const,
    22→  strokeLinejoin: 'round' as const,
    23→};
    24→
    25→export function ClipboardIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {
    26→  return (
    27→    <svg {...svgProps(props)}>
    28→      <rect x="5" y="2" width="10" height="3" rx="1" {...STROKE} />
    29→      <rect x="3" y="4" width="14" height="14" rx="2" {...STROKE} />
    30→      <line x1="7" y1="10" x2="13" y2="10" {...STROKE} />
    31→      <line x1="7" y1="13" x2="11" y2="13" {...STROKE} />
    32→    </svg>
    33→  );
    34→}
    35→
    36→export function SnippetsIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {
    37→  return (
    38→    <svg {...svgProps(props)}>
    39→      <rect x="3" y="3" width="14" height="14" rx="2" {...STROKE} />
    40→      <polyline points="7,7 9,9 7,11" {...STROKE} />
    41→      <line x1="11" y1="11" x2="13" y2="11" {...STROKE} />
    42→    </svg>
    43→  );
    44→}
    45→
    46→export function EmojiIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {
    47→  return (
    48→    <svg {...svgProps(props)}>
    49→      <circle cx="10" cy="10" r="7" {...STROKE} />
    50→      <circle cx="7.5" cy="8.5" r="0.75" fill="currentColor" />
    51→      <circle cx="12.5" cy="8.5" r="0.75" fill="currentColor" />
    52→      <path d="M7 12a3.5 3.5 0 006 0" {...STROKE} />
    53→    </svg>
    54→  );
    55→}
    56→
    57→export function WindowIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {
    58→  return (
    59→    <svg {...svgProps(props)}>
    60→      <rect x="2" y="3" width="16" height="14" rx="2" {...STROKE} />
    61→      <line x1="2" y1="7" x2="18" y2="7" {...STROKE} />
    62→      <circle cx="5" cy="5" r="0.75" fill="currentColor" />
    63→      <circle cx="7.5" cy="5" r="0.75" fill="currentColor" />
    64→      <circle cx="10" cy="5" r="0.75" fill="currentColor" />
    65→    </svg>
    66→  );
    67→}
    68→
    69→export function CalculatorIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {
    70→  return (
    71→    <svg {...svgProps(props)}>
    72→      <rect x="4" y="2" width="12" height="16" rx="2" {...STROKE} />
    73→      <rect x="6" y="4" width="8" height="4" rx="1" {...STROKE} />
    74→      <circle cx="7.5" cy="11" r="0.75" fill="currentColor" />
    75→      <circle cx="10" cy="11" r="0.75" fill="currentColor" />
    76→      <circle cx="12.5" cy="11" r="0.75" fill="currentColor" />
    77→      <circle cx="7.5" cy="14" r="0.75" fill="currentColor" />
    78→      <circle cx="10" cy="14" r="0.75" fill="currentColor" />
    79→      <circle cx="12.5" cy="14" r="0.75" fill="currentColor" />
    80→    </svg>
    81→  );
    82→}
    83→
    84→export function CpuIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {
    85→  return (
    86→    <svg {...svgProps(props)}>
    87→      <rect x="5" y="5" width="10" height="10" rx="1" {...STROKE} />
    88→      <rect x="7" y="7" width="6" height="6" rx="0.5" {...STROKE} />
    89→      <line x1="8" y1="3" x2="8" y2="5" {...STROKE} />
    90→      <line x1="12" y1="3" x2="12" y2="5" {...STROKE} />
    91→      <line x1="8" y1="15" x2="8" y2="17" {...STROKE} />
    92→      <line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="17" {...STROKE} />

    96→      <line x1="15" y1="12" x2="17" y2="12" {...STROKE} />
    97→    </svg>
    98→  );
    99→}
   100→

   110→
   111→export function CodeIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {
   112→  return (

   114→      <polyline points="6,6 2,10 6,14" {...STROKE} />
   115→      <polyline points="14,6 18,10 14,14" {...STROKE} />
   116→      <line x1="12" y1="4" x2="8" y2="16" {...STROKE} />
   117→    </svg>
   118→  );
   119→}
   120→
   121→export function TerminalIcon(props: IconProps = {}) {
   122→  return (
   123→    <svg {...svgProps(props)}>
